metadata.page_title: Stigmatus Covenant Chaos Cultist Army List

entries.scope: Tzeentch Doomwing, Tzeentch Firelord and Traitor Navy aircraft formations

special_rules.name: Special Rules
special_rules.text: Certain units have special abilities described in Augmented Summoning (see Augmented Summoning ) and Daemonic Focus (see Daemonic Focus ).

(Each upgrade may be taken once per coven.)

abilities_or_notes: A Daemon Prince may have wings, the unit gains Jump Packs and a move of 30cm, while its armour value is reduced to 4+.

profiles.name: Chimera
abilities_or_notes: May transport two infantry units without Jump Packs or Mounted .

profiles.name: Bloodthirster
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed, all summoned units within 5cm are destroyed on a roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Chaos Altar
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed. All units within 5cm suffer a macro-weapon hit on a roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Great Unclean One
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed, all summoned units within 5cm are destroyed on a roll of 6+.
parse_warnings: Boolean weapon line folded into previous weapon for Great Unclean One.

abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed, all summoned units within 5cm are destroyed on a roll of 6+.
parse_warnings: Boolean weapon line folded into previous weapon for Keeper of Secrets.

profiles.name: Lord of Battles
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Move the unit 3D6cm in a random direction. If it moves into impassable terrain or another unit it can't move over it will stop and suffer one point of damage. All units it moves into or over suffer a hit on a roll of 4+.

profiles.name: Lord of Change
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed, all summoned units within 5cm are destroyed on a roll of 6+.
parse_warnings: Boolean weapon line folded into previous weapon for Lord of Change.

profiles.name: Plague Tower
abilities_or_notes: May transport sixteen Great Unclean Ones or infantry units without Jump Packs or Mounted ; Great Unclean Ones count as two units each. Critical Hit Effect: The unit takes a point of damage and D3 units of the player's choice that are being transported are destroyed.

profiles.name: Questor Titan
abilities_or_notes: May step over units and pieces of terrain that are lower than the unit's knees and less than 2cm wide. Critical Hit Effect: Move the unit D6cm in a random direction. If it moves into impassable terrain or another unit it can't move over it will stop and suffer one point of damage. All units it moves into or over suffer a hit on a roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Subjugator Titan
abilities_or_notes: May step over units and pieces of terrain that are lower than the unit's knees and less than 2cm wide. Critical Hit Effect: Move the unit D6cm in a random direction. If it moves into impassable terrain or another unit it can't move over it will stop and suffer one point of damage. All units it moves into or over suffer a hit on a roll of 6+.

army_notes.name: Using The Army List
army_notes.text:
The following army list allows you to field a Chaos Cult army based on the Stigmatus Covenant Cult that arose in the Mackan system during Abaddon’s 13 th Crusade. It can also be used as a stand in army list for other Cult armies.
Chaos Cultist formations come in two types: covens and support covens . Each coven you include in the army allows you to field any one support coven. Although you can only take a support coven is you first take a coven, they are treated as separate independent formations during the battle and do not have to move around together. Additionally, Chaos Daemon Engine support covens must belong to Chaos Undivided or the same faction as the Cultist coven associated with it. For example, if the army included two Khorne Stigmatus Cultist covens the army could include two Khorne daemon engines covens or one Khorne and one undivided daemon engine coven.
In addition, formations may be given upgrades. Each type of upgrade can only be taken once by a formation. Upgrades are added to the formation and are not a separate formation. Each upgrade that is taken adds to the cost of the formation, as shown on the upgrade chart.
Finally, each Stigmatus Covenant Chaos Cultist army may field up to two Plague Zombie Infestations.
